name: The Forge
description:
Suit Hammers (Str)

Alignment lawful neutral

The Forge denotes strength through diversity. As long as you have The Forge invested, you can carry more than normal—increase your maximum and encumbered Bulk limits by 2.

Activate (2 Actions) envision, Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect You pass the card over an adjacent Broken (but not destroyed) object (magical or otherwise) of up to 4 Bulk, and restore the object to its full Hit Point total, removing the broken condition in the process.
